task_completion.description: Agent visited USDA websites (NASS, ERS, or WASDE) in Firefox
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser window showing a loaded page from nass.usda.gov, ers.usda.gov, or a WASDE report.

task_completion.description: A Firefox bookmark folder named 'Crop Planning Research' was created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox bookmarks toolbar, menu, or library window showing a folder specifically named 'Crop Planning Research'.

task_completion.description: At least 5 relevant USDA pages are saved in the bookmark folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Crop Planning Research' bookmark folder expanded or opened in the Library, displaying at least 5 distinct bookmarked items.

task_completion.description: A JSON file named crop_planning_advisory.json is created in ~/Documents/
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing the file `crop_planning_advisory.json` located in the `~/Documents/` directory.

task_completion.description: The JSON file has the exact required structure and keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the JSON file showing top-level keys 'corn', 'soybeans', 'data_year', and 'recommendation'. The 'corn' and 'soybeans' objects must each contain 'iowa_production_bushels_millions', 'national_yield_bushels_per_acre', and 'price_per_bushel_dollars'.

task_completion.description: The numerical values in the JSON file fall within plausible verified ranges
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file contents showing values within these ranges: Corn production (1500-3000), Corn yield (150-200), Corn price (3.0-8.5); Soybean production (350-750), Soybean yield (40-60), Soybean price (8.0-18.0).

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Firefox browser to find the data
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively navigating USDA websites in Firefox, rather than hallucinating the data or using a terminal script to fetch it without browsing.

integrity.description: Bookmarks were created using the Firefox GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmarks should be visible in the actual Firefox browser interface (toolbar, menu, or Library window), not just injected into a database file via terminal.

integrity.description: The recommendation text in the JSON is customized based on the data
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'recommendation' field in the JSON file contains actual advisory text written by the agent, rather than placeholder text like '<Your text advice based on the data>'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Plausible verified ranges for the data: Corn Iowa production: 1500-3000 million bushels. Corn national yield: 150-200 bushels/acre. Corn price: $3.00-$8.50/bushel. Soybean Iowa production: 350-750 million bushels. Soybean national yield: 40-60 bushels/acre. Soybean price: $8.00-$18.00/bushel.
